outOfScopeRows.reason: Counterspell is a level-3 reaction branch and remains out of scope

rationale: Accepted rows route through generic ArmorClass target-admission, ArmorClass active-effect lifecycle, ArmorClassSpellEffect, and production-discovered ReactionSpell reducer subjects with target-selection, active-effect, or reaction-owned route evidence. CP7-D Mage Armor admission and expiry rows are accepted only as route-shape evidence derived from cleanroom FU01D target-admission and CP5 active-effect lifecycle route-owner evidence; no full selected Mage Armor semantics are claimed. Counterspell remains out of scope.
